task_completion.description: Log in to the OpenCAD system as an administrator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenCAD dashboard or interface is visible, indicating a successful login (e.g., admin username or admin panel options are visible).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the user management or administration section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A page displaying a list of users or user management settings is visible in the OpenCAD interface.

task_completion.description: Locate and open the profile or settings for James Rodriguez.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The edit page, profile, or department assignment modal for 'James Rodriguez' (james.rodriguez@opencad.local) is open and visible.

task_completion.description: Revoke the 'Police' department access for the target user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the department assignment section for James Rodriguez, the 'Police' department is shown as unchecked, deselected, or removed.

task_completion.description: Ensure the 'Civilian' department access is retained for the target user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the department assignment section for James Rodriguez, the 'Civilian' department remains checked, selected, or actively assigned.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenCAD graphical user interface via a web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser (e.g., Chromium, Firefox) navigating the OpenCAD web interface, rather than terminal windows executing curl commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database commands to modify user access.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing MySQL/MariaDB prompts or SQL UPDATE/DELETE queries being executed.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual OpenCAD application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots display the genuine OpenCAD web interface with its standard layout and styling, not a text editor or a mock HTML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target user is James Rodriguez (james.rodriguez@opencad.local). The task requires revoking his access to the 'Police' department while preserving his access to the 'Civilian' department. Admin credentials are admin@opencad.local / Admin123!.
